prompt: A first-person POV screenshot inside a {argument name="game environment" default="VRChat lobby"} featuring a dark checkered floor, a "VR CHAT" welcome sign on the left, a "Mirror" doorway, and an "Avatar Showcase" on the right. The viewer's hands are visible in the foreground, wearing white sleeves with red dashed stitching, reaching forward. A red muted microphone UI icon sits in the bottom left corner. In the center stands {argument name="tall character" default="Ran Mouri from Detective Conan in her blue school uniform"}, smiling with closed eyes and {argument name="action" default="patting the heads of the two smaller characters"}. On her left is {argument name="small character 1" default="Conan Edogawa in his blue suit and red bowtie"}. On her right is {argument name="small character 2" default="the Ugandan Knuckles meme character"}. Each character has a floating nameplate above them: the tall girl's reads "Ran Mouri" in yellow over "LetsAskAQuestion" in white, the boy's reads "Conan Edogawa" over "conan.exe", and the red creature's reads "Ugandan Knuckles" over "do u know de way".
translatedPrompt: 一张位于 {argument name="game environment" default="VRChat 大厅"} 内的第一人称 POV 截图，画面包含深色方格地板、左侧的“VR CHAT”欢迎标志、“Mirror”门廊以及右侧的“Avatar Showcase”。前景可见观察者的双手，穿着带有红色虚线缝合的白色袖子，正向前伸出。左下角有一个红色的静音麦克风 UI 图标。画面中央站着 {argument name="tall character" default="《名侦探柯南》中身穿蓝色校服的毛利兰"}，她闭着眼睛微笑，正在 {argument name="action" default="抚摸两个较小角色的头"}。她的左侧是 {argument name="small character 1" default="身穿蓝色西装、佩戴红色领结的江户川柯南"}。她的右侧是 {argument name="small character 2" default="乌干达纳克鲁斯 (Ugandan Knuckles) 模因角色"}。每个角色上方都有一个悬浮名称牌：高个女孩的牌子上用黄色写着“Ran Mouri”，下方用白色写着“LetsAskAQuestion”；男孩的牌子上写着“Conan Edogawa”，下方是“conan.exe”；红色生物的牌子上写着“Ugandan Knuckles”，下方是“do u know de way”。

breakdown.creativeCore: 第一人称 VRChat 模因联动截图：生成一张虚拟现实社交游戏大厅的第一人称视角截图，呈现动漫与模因头像联动及悬浮名称牌的画面。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
